change_class: TIER VALUES ONLY — no shape change
change_note: Cross-venue asset-class detection (src/lib/asset-class-detection.ts) reclassifies CEX tokenized stocks/indices/commodities/FX from Tier 4 to Tier 3. Affects byAsset[].tier, byTier.* membership, byExchange.*.byTier, recentSignals[].tier. The response SHAPE + allowed-key set + forbidden-key set + cache/error contract are BYTE-UNCHANGED vs api-performance-public-shape-snapshot-2026-06-07.json (which this supersedes — knowledge-index is one-snapshot-per-endpoint). PFE WR + sample-size only; no internal fields added.
error_contract: Fail-open: a per-venue contracts-endpoint detector failure degrades that venue to empty (cross-venue union still resolves) and never throws — asset-class-detection wraps every detector in try/catch + Promise.allSettled. The route never 5xx's on a detector failure; classifyAsset falls back to the STATIC seed floor when the snapshot is cold.
cache_contract: Unchanged. Response caching as prior (bucket-keyed rolling aggregate). The cross-venue asset-class snapshot warms independently in warmTierCaches (1h TTL, 3-tier live→stale→seed) and is read synchronously by classifyAsset.
consumers: ops/monitoring/tier-misclassification-canary.sh (NEW this wave — reads byAsset[].tier to flag Tier-4-but-TradFi drift)
drift_check_command: curl -s https://algovault.com/api/performance-public | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); ALLOW=['asset_count','byAsset','byCallType','byExchange','byTier','byTimeframe','exchange_count','hold_rate','holdsByTier','methodology','overall','period','recentSignals','shadow_venue_count','timeframe_count','totalCalls','totalHolds']; assert sorted(d.keys())==ALLOW, 'TOP-KEY DRIFT'; blob=json.dumps(d); assert all(k not in blob for k in ['outcome_return_pct','outcome_price','outcome_won','pfe_return_pct','mae_return_pct']), 'FORBIDDEN KEY LEAK'; print('shape OK,', len(d['byAsset']), 'assets,', sum(1 for v in d['byAsset'].values() if v.get('tier')==3), 'Tier-3')"

anchors_at_capture.note: tier VALUES shift post-deploy (CEX tokenized stocks → Tier 3); the KEY SET + forbidden_keys are the stable contract. A KEY-set change or forbidden-key leak is the drift signal, NOT a tier-value change.
